steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says the organization acts on its commitment "by promoting the works of" indigenous photographers. The blank must name an action meaning to demonstrate or put a commitment into practice through concrete behavior.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "concludes": Means to terminate or conclude — opposite of demonstrating a commitment. ✗
  • "explains": Means to describe or clarify — the organization is acting, not narrating. ✗
  • "precedes": A temporal meaning with no fit here. ✗
  • "shows": Means to demonstrate or prove through action — showing commitment by promoting indigenous photographers' work fits exactly. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
